content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market under pressure: Nifty -1.25%, Bank Nifty -1.51%, Realty/PSU Banks/Auto/Energy all sharply down, India VIX +12.35% to 18.92 — risk-off tape. FMCG (Marico, Dabur, HUL) and select Pharma (SunPharma, Lauruslabs) showing relative strength as defensive rotation. IT mixed; Coforge ripping on Q4 + Cigniti merger catalyst. Posture: manage existing book — trail SLs on winners, hold theses-intact losers within SL budget, no aggressive new admits into a VIX +12% session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.2% winner. Current SL 1075 sits ABOVE CMP 1074 — that is a self-inflicted stopout (Rule 15c trail-gap violation). Loosening SL down to 1040 (~3.2% below CMP, locks ~+5.7% gain over entry 984) restores ~1% trail-gap room. Note: this is a downward move on SL on a long which the engine may reject as a 'loosening'. If rejected, the position will likely stop out today at 1075 anyway — accept that as the SL doing its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, well within SL 121 (-3.3%). Gold consolidating after rally; VIX spike supports defensive holding. Thesis intact, hold to SL or target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% winner; Q4 beat, FMCG leadership today, 22% revenue growth, record high. Current SL 825 is only 1.2% below CMP 833.30 — borderline trail-gap. Move SL to entry 820 (breakeven, ~1.6% gap from CMP) to give the trade room while keeping risk capped. This is a tighten of effective trail-room? Actually 820 < 825 is a loosening. Cancel that — keep SL at 825 via HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% winner; gap up +7.4% on Q4 + Cigniti merger catalyst. Current SL 1356.71 is only 1.4% below CMP 1380 — acceptable but tight given Coforge ATR. Actually 1356.71 already protects gain (+7.8% over entry 1259). Raise target to 1450 to reflect new momentum. SL move from 1356.71 to 1340 is a LOOSENING — engine will reject. Keep SL where it is, only update target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, CMP 2997 vs SL 3000 — SL is ABOVE CMP, position should already be stopping out at this tick. Defence cluster under pressure today (-3.13% on day). Let the SL fire — that's exactly what it was placed for. Thesis (corvette L1, P-17B pipeline) intact but tape says exit at SL. Do NOT pre-empt or loosen — Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, CMP 827.45 vs SL 820 — 0.9% gap, marginal. Q4 beat, BFSI defensive, investor conferences upcoming. Hold; if it dips to 820 the SL will protect at near-breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9%, CMP 1445.90 vs SL 1465 — SL above CMP, will stop out. Q4 beat (+36.6% PAT), thesis intact, but tape took it down. Let SL fire as designed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, CMP 1624.90 vs SL 1580 (2.8% below). Q4 turnaround intact, Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 catalyst. Hold; let it develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 2779 vs SL 2755 (0.9% below). Q4 PAT +47%, specialty chem thesis intact. Hold within SL budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 9091 vs SL 9020 (0.8% below). Q4 strong, brokerage targets 9700-10500, 3.3x vol surge today (+0.98% in red tape). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0%, CMP 1989 vs SL 1955 (1.7% below). Research turned BEARISH post Q4: PAT -17.4% YoY, UBS/Citi SELL, consensus target 1751 implies -14% downside. Thesis materially weaker than at entry. Let SL absorb; do NOT loosen. If it bounces toward 2050 consider exit-on-strength next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.7%, CMP 356.80 vs SL 354 (0.8% below). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. Tape pressure on BFSI today. Hold; let SL absorb noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, CMP 10598 vs SL 10440 (1.5% below). Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 12,000 buyback floor, Rs 150 dividend. Thesis very intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, CMP 481.65 vs SL 472 (2.0% below). Q4 +16%, FY27 guidance upgraded to low double-digit, FMCG leadership today. Position recovering off open. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, CMP 1246.60 vs SL 1226 (entry, breakeven SL already). Q4 results imminent — binary event. Per Rule 11: trim risk into earnings via tight SL. SL at entry is appropriate; no change (this is HOLD-equivalent — withdrawing the MODIFY)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1075 currently above CMP 1074 — engine will fire SL at next tick. Accept as designed exit at +9.2% locked. Cannot loosen SL per engine rule."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within SL budget, defensive hold."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 825 sits 1% below CMP 833 — borderline tight but Marico Q4 momentum supports holding to existing SL."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1356.71 protects +7.8% gain; tight (1.4% below CMP) but acceptable given Coforge intraday range. Don't churn."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 3000 already above CMP 2997 — position is effectively stopped. Will exit at SL trigger this tick."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within SL budget; investor conferences upcoming."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1465 above CMP 1445.90 — stopping out as designed. Q4 beat thesis didn't prevent rate-off tape; SL doing its job."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Turnaround thesis intact; SL 2.8% below CMP, room for noise."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +47%, SL 0.9% below CMP — tight but defensible."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Volume surge 3.3x in down tape signals institutional accumulation. Hold."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Research turned bearish post-Q4 but SL 1955 still 1.7% below CMP — let the placed SL handle it rather than pre-empt at -1%."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL 0.8% below CMP, will absorb or stop."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strongest fundamental hand on the book — Q4 +103%, buyback floor 12000. Easy hold."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG bid today, position recovering. Hold to SL or target."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 results imminent — SL already at entry (breakeven), event-trade discipline satisfied."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Skipping new admits this session despite cash buffer of 35% — explicit per-name rationale per Rule 18: THERMAX (+14.6% gap, no entry on gap-chase day with VIX +12%); PERSISTENT/HCLTECH/INFY (IT bounce candidates but Coforge already provides cluster exposure at +9.3%); SUNPHARMA (Q4 May 21, would be event-trade with 7+ session window — chart already extended near 52w high); TATACONSUM/BERGEPAINT (FMCG cluster — Marico+Dabur+Pidilit already 3 names, cluster-cap concern); NUVAMA (no quality research, gap chase); NBCC/CGPOWER (capital goods cluster already has GRSE+POLYCAB+BHARATFORG = 3 names, cluster-cap binding); LALPATHLAB (+6.68% gap, no chase); HFCL pending order from prior session — CANCELING (see decisions). Net: cash buffer is justified by VIX +12.35% risk-off tape plus 5 sub-SL positions likely to stop out this session — preserving cash for re-entry on stabilization is the correct posture, not anchoring.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavy with day-0 positions sitting near or at SL on a VIX-spike tape — PNBHOUSING, GRSE, PIDILITIND all have SL above CMP and will fire this tick. That is by design: SLs were placed at entry as the calibrated maximum-loss budget, and the tape met them. Per Rule 17 I am NOT pre-empting or loosening any of these. Expected realized loss from forced exits today: GRSE ~-₹1,250, PIDILITIND ~-₹1,440, offset by PNBHOUSING ~+₹7,200 lock-in. Net session realized estimated +₹4,500. This is the SL system working — not panic. Rule 18 explicit: no new admits warranted today given (a) 5+ positions imminently triggering, freeing ₹100K+ cash for cleaner re-entries next session, (b) VIX +12% is a documented risk-off event, (c) cluster caps already binding on capital goods and FMCG. Cancel the stale HFCL MIS LIMIT @133.50 — 7497m old (5+ days), thesis dead."
}
